quality.rationale: 基于能量动量守恒的多步代数推导结合穆斯堡尔效应真实物理背景

origin.question: Problem 2.10. Consider the reaction $\mathbf{A}\rightarrow \mathbf{B} + \mathbf{C}$ (with particle masses $\mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{A}}, \mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{B}}, \mathfrak{m}_{\mathbf{C}}$ ).(b) An atom of mass M at rest decays to a state of rest energy M-δ by emitting a photon of energy hν. Show that hν < δ. In the Mössbauer effect, why is hν = δ?
origin.answer: $h\nu = \delta - \frac{\delta^2}{2M} < \delta$；在穆斯堡尔效应中，反冲动量由约 $10^{23}$ 个原子共享，反冲能量可忽略，因此 $h\nu \approx \delta$。
